message:
✨ Show why missions are recommended (#1498)

- Section title: 'Recommended for Your Cluster' vs 'Explore CNCF Solutions'
- Cards show cluster match badge (green checkmark) when matched
- Match reasons show with ✓ prefix for cluster matches, • for community
- Baseline reasons include CNCF project name and category
- Remove numeric score display (confusing without context)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
